findings.location: Source introduction paragraph (before コードサンプル)
findings.description: The source introduction explains the widget's scope: (1) spec:validation is for describing server-side 項目間精査 and セマンティック精査 (including DB突合 and ビジネスロジック精査), and (2) 単項目精査仕様 does NOT need to be described here because it is handled by each input item's domain definition. The second point in particular is decision-necessary guidance — an AI answering questions about when/how to use this widget would give incomplete advice without it. Neither the widget purpose detail nor the 単項目精査 exclusion note appears anywhere in the knowledge file.
findings.source_evidence: 単項目精査仕様については、各入力項目のドメイン定義に準じて実施されるため、ここに記述する必要はない。
